title: Home Screen - Both earbuds are disconnected
scenario: Verify that when both earbuds are placed in the case, the app shows greyed-out battery fields and a disconnected status with red indicator.
steps: 3. Put both earbuds in the case.
expected: After step 2: The Status Box shows "Left", "Right", and "Case" fields with battery level and green indicator, and a "Status" field showing "connected" with green indicator. The device image shows left and right earbuds. Note: Tern does not show case field.\n\nAfter step 3: "Left", "Right", and "Case" fields are greyed out showing only the % symbol (not exact percentage). "Status" field shows "disconnected" with red indicator. Image for both earbuds is greyed out.
